response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified two songs based on on-screen text in the video. 
2. First song: '出会ってから付き合うまでのあの感じ' (Deatte kara tsukiau made no ano kanji), performed by SHE IS SUMMER. Used search query: '"Deatte kara tsukiau made no ano kanji" SHE IS SUMMER Japanese and English lyrics'. 
3. Second song: 'ドキッ! こういうのが恋なの?' (Dokki! Kouiu no ga koi na no?), originally by Erina Mano (written by Tsunku). Used search query: '"Dokki! Kouiu no ga koi na no?" Erina Mano Japanese and English lyrics'. 
4. Compiled metadata and retrieved lyrics for both songs to create the scene breakdown.
response.global_summary: A medley of two popular Japanese pop songs performed by VTubers Nene, Lamy, Polka, and Botan on a 3D stage with animated backgrounds.

scenes.description: The four performers (Nene, Lamy, Polka, Botan) perform 'Deatte kara tsukiau made no ano kanji'. On-screen text displays the song title and credits.
scenes.song_title: Deatte kara tsukiau made no ano kanji
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
出会ってから付き合うまでのあの感じでいよう
わかってるふりなんて100年後もいらない
二人の合図が増えたって大事なこと言おう
夏の日のはじまりを季節が変わっても覚えてて
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Let's keep up that feeling from when we met to when we started dating.
I don't need a facade of understanding even 100 years from now.
Let's keep saying important things even if our signals increase.
Remember this summer day even if the seasons change.

scenes.description: The stage background shifts from a room setting to a more open stage view with large signs.
The four performers perform 'Dokki! Kouiu no ga koi na no?'. On-screen text displays the song title.
scenes.song_title: Dokki! Kouiu no ga koi na no?
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ドキッ! こういうのが恋なの?
ねえ歌うわ
そうよあなたに
甘えたいけれど 恥ずかしいかもね
かもね Oi!
願い事の呪文 ほら
ムニャムニャムニャ～
ずっとこのまま時が
止まらぬかもね
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Doki! Is this what love is?
Hey, I'll sing for you.
I want to act spoiled, but maybe I'm embarrassed.
Maybe... O'i!
May the spell of wishes come true
Maybe... I hope this moment, this time, doesn't stop.
